message.entry: To install with an input file, set agreeToLicense=yes and uncomment the line to accept the license agreement.
File Installation Key not detected. Generate a key in License Center on mathworks.com and uncomment the line.
Not a valid key. For more information on how to get a valid key see this MATLAB Answer.
The license file selected appears to be invalid
The entitlement selected appears to be invalid
This is not a license file
Unable to read license file
Hostid Missing
Hostids Do Not Match
A hostid could not be found in your license file. After installation, you will have to manually edit the SERVER line in your license file. (located at {0})
The hostid in the license file must be for this computer. Obtain a new license file generated for the hostid of this computer ({0}) from your license administrator or from MathWorks License Center.
Invalid Activation Key for your license
Error
Folder names cannot contain non-English characters.
Folder names cannot contain {0} and the destination cannot be named "private".
Folder names can only contain alphanumeric characters and {0}. The destination cannot be named "private".
Unable to write to the selected folder.
Failed to create the specified folder. To continue, select a different folder.
Specify the full path to the destination folder.
The folder is not a directory.
Unable to install into the user profile folder. To continue, select a different folder.
Unable to install into the same folder as the installer. To continue, select a different folder.

You have selected {0}

We recommend installing in: {1}
Warning
The selected folder has {1} installed. {0} must be installed in a separate folder.
Unable to install in the specified folder. Delete existing files or install in a different folder.
Overwrite Error
Unable to install in the specified folder. To continue, select an empty folder.

Installation files for the following products are not available: {0}. Comment out these products in the input file and restart the installation. If you need to install these missing products, download them first using the "Download Only" option in the MathWorks Product Installer user interface.
The specified File Installation Key does not allow access to the following products: {0}. Comment out these products from the input file and restart the installation.

The following products are required to proceed:
{0}
Click Add to include these products in your installation.
Alternatively, you can select a folder with the required products. Click Cancel and go to Destination.

Some selected products depend on:
{0}
Click Add to include these in your installation.
Click Don't add to continue without these products.

Insufficient disk space.

Location: {0}

Required space: {1}

Increase disk space, select fewer products, or choose another destination.
Warning
File Not Found Error

Unable to find:
{0}

Learn more:MATLAB Answer
For help:MathWorks Support.
Missing Installation Files
Unable to load product files. Product files must be in the same folder as the input file. For help getting the product files, see the installation documentation on MATLAB Answer.
Download Error

There was an error downloading product files.
Check your internet connection and then rerun the Installer.

For help, see this MATLAB Answer
.
Extract Error

There was an error while extracting product files.
Try rerunning the Installer.

For help, see this MATLAB Answer
.

Something unexpected occurred.
Try rerunning the Installer.

For help, see this MATLAB Answer
.
Confirm Selections

entry.note: Install or download folder based on workflow

message.entry: Destination
Products
{0} of {1} products
Platforms
Something Unexpected Occurred
To resolve this issue, contact Customer Support.
Authentication option:
Authorize this computer now
Authenticate (sign in) each time the software starts
Windows User Name:
Login Name:
{0} required
Connection Error

Unable to connect to MathWorks.
For more information on resolving this issue, see this MATLAB Answer.
Download Error
Unable to connect to MathWorks. For help, see this MATLAB Answer.
There is a session of MATLAB running on this machine. To proceed you must close all running MATLAB sessions.
Invalid user name or password
Learn More
Products Already Installed

All selected products are already installed.

To reinstall products, see this MATLAB Answer..
Service Error
Installed
Downloaded
Downloading Installer
Download complete
Preparing and extracting files...
For instructions on how to extract installers for non-Windows platforms, see this MATLAB Answer.
Performing post-installation tasks. This may take a few minutes...

{0} already exists, but is installed in a different location.
You must remove the service before installing the new one.

The network license manager has been installed as a service on your computer. This service has not been started yet. Before running {0}, you must manually start the license manager by using lmtools.exe (found in the etc\\win64 folder of this installation). See Start the Network License Manager.

The network license manager has been installed in the etc\\win64 folder of this installation, but has not been configured as a service on your computer. Before running {0}, you must configure the license manager to start up as a service automatically on machine startup. See Configure License Manager as Service.

The network license manager has been installed, but has not been started. Before running {0}, you must start the license manager manually. See Start the Network License Manager. To configure the license manager to start automatically, see instructions in the same section.

The network license manager has been installed, but has not been started. Before running {0}, you must start the license manager manually. See Start the Network License Manager. To configure the license manager to start automatically, see instructions in the same section.
Download Error

An error occurred while downloading the installer.

For help see this MATLAB Answer or contact MathWorks Support.

Unable to load requested product files.
For help, see this MATLAB Answer.
Product Dependencies

To proceed, you must select a destination with the following products installed:

{0}

Click Cancel and then select a destination that has the following products installed:

{0}
Click Continue to install without these dependencies.
